metadata.name: Check Status of a Pothole Repair

description: A citizen who previously reported a pothole calls to check on the status of the repair.

nodes.task_description: Look up the original service request using the citizen's name or the request ID.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the original pothole report.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the associated work order in the public works system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the work order is marked as 'Completed' yesterday.

nodes.task_description: Inform the citizen that records show the repair was completed and close the service request.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the final status update to the citizen.
